_comment: AUTHORED source of truth mapping Sanctuary content to 3D assets. Two entry kinds: 'element' entries carry an iconKey from content/sanctuary/*.json (coarse/charismatic/relationship); 'scenery' entries carry zone+tierMin (the tier dressing layers). normalize.mjs processes raw -> GLB; build_manifest.mjs emits the app manifest. Until a zone's models land, its icon keys stay in placeholders.json (CI-enforced either/or).
